LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHIEKH ELLAHI'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGES A WRITTEN CONTRACT THAT IS MODIFIED BY AN ORAL AGREEMENT. IT IS NOT POSSIBLE FROM THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT TO ADDRESS DEFENDANT'S CONTENTIONS RELATED TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. BOTH PARTIES SEEK TO REFER TO DOCUMENTS AND STATEMENTS BEYOND THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT. THESE CONTENTIONS ARE BEST ADDRESSED BY DISCOVERY AND MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
